title: Queen

moves.title: Impossible
effects: Apply 3 Chains of Binding to player

moves.title: Burn Bright for Me
effects: Apply 1 Strength to each living ally (except self)

move_pattern: Starts with Puppet Strings -> You're Mine -> (if TorchHeadAmalgam alive: Burn Bright for Me loop; if Amalgam dead: Off with Your Head). After Amalgam dies: Off with Your Head -> Execution -> Enrage -> Off with Your Head (repeating). If Burn Bright for Me is queued when Amalgam dies, immediately switches to Enrage.
notes: Phase 1: Queen cycles between Puppet Strings, You're Mine, and Burn Bright for Me (buffing allies and blocking) while the TorchHeadAmalgam companion is alive. Phase 2: When TorchHeadAmalgam dies, Queen transitions to an aggressive loop of Off with Your Head (5-hit attack) -> Execution (big hit) -> Enrage (+2 Strength) repeating. If she was mid-Burn Bright for Me cycle when the Amalgam died, she immediately jumps to Enrage. Fight is paired with TorchHeadAmalgam enemy.
